description: 抖音图文发布流程（v1.7.7：图片上传改用 DOM 查找可见的图片上传区并派发 drop 事件 + 调试日志验证 input 命中）

steps.descript: 导航到抖音图文上传页
等待进入上传页
等待上传组件加载完成

steps.value: const inputs = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input[type="file"]')); return inputs.map((e, i) => { const r = e.getBoundingClientRect(); return { index: i, accept: e.accept || '', className: (e.className||'').slice(0,80), visible: r.width > 0 && r.height > 0, rect: {w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height)}, parentClass: (e.parentElement?.className||'').slice(0,80), grandparentClass: (e.parentElement?.parentElement?.className||'').slice(0,80) }; });
steps.descript: 调试：列出页面所有 file input（accept/class/parent），用于精准定位图片上传 input
上传图片（封面图）- 优先 accept=image/* 的 input
steps.ai_intent: 找到抖音图文上传图片的文件选择按钮（注意不要选到视频上传 input）

steps.descript: 等待图片开始上传（setInputFiles 触发后给浏览器 3 秒读取文件并开始上传）

steps.value: const uploadItems = document.querySelectorAll('[class*="upload-item"], [class*="image-item"], [class*="file-item"], [class*="image"].image-card, .image-container, [class*="upload-card"]'); const allImgs = document.querySelectorAll('img'); const uploadRelatedImgs = Array.from(allImgs).filter(i => { const r = i.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width > 50; }); return { uploadItemCount: uploadItems.length, uploadImgs: uploadRelatedImgs.map(i => ({ src: (i.src||'').slice(0, 60), w: Math.round(i.getBoundingClientRect().width), h: Math.round(i.getBoundingClientRect().height) })).slice(0, 8) };
steps.descript: 调试：上传后 3 秒检查上传项和图片是否出现

steps.value: const sleep = (ms) => new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, ms)); const start = Date.now(); let lastInfo = null; const isRealThumb = (i) => { const r = i.getBoundingClientRect(); if (r.width < 80 || r.height < 80) return false; const src = i.src || ''; if (src.startsWith('data:')) return false; return true; }; while (Date.now() - start < 45000) { const allImgs = document.querySelectorAll('.image-item img, .upload-item img, .image-container img, [class*="image"][class*="item"] img, [class*="upload"] img, div[class*="image"] img'); const realThumbs = Array.from(allImgs).filter(isRealThumb); const progressBars = document.querySelectorAll('.progress-bar, .uploading, [class*="progress"], [class*="loading"], [class*="uploading"]'); const visibleProgress = Array.from(progressBars).filter(p => { const r = p.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width > 0 && r.height > 0; }); lastInfo = { realThumbCount: realThumbs.length, totalImgCount: allImgs.length, progressCount: visibleProgress.length, elapsed: Math.round((Date.now() - start) / 1000) }; if (realThumbs.length > 0 && visibleProgress.length === 0) { return { ok: true, ...lastInfo }; } await sleep(2000); } return { ok: false, ...lastInfo, reason: '等待 45 秒后图片仍未上传完成（可能上传失败、被拒绝或 input 命中错误）' };
steps.descript: 等待图片上传完成（轮询检测真实缩略图出现 + 进度条消失，最多 45 秒）

steps.value: const imgs = document.querySelectorAll('.image-item img, .upload-item img, .image-container img, [class*="image"][class*="item"] img, [class*="upload"] img, div[class*="image"] img'); const all = Array.from(imgs).map(i => ({ src: (i.src||'').slice(0, 80), w: Math.round(i.getBoundingClientRect().width), h: Math.round(i.getBoundingClientRect().height), isPlaceholder: i.src.startsWith('data:') || i.getBoundingClientRect().width < 80 })); return { total: all.length, realThumbs: all.filter(x => !x.isPlaceholder).length, placeholders: all.filter(x => x.isPlaceholder).length, images: all.slice(0, 8) };
steps.descript: 调试：列出页面上所有图片（区分真实缩略图和占位符）

steps.value: const dialogs = document.querySelectorAll('.semi-modal-content, [role="dialog"], .semi-modal'); for (const d of dialogs) { const r = d.getBoundingClientRect(); if (r.width > 0 && r.height > 0) { const btns = d.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"]'); for (const b of btns) { const t = (b.innerText||b.textContent||'').trim(); if (t.includes('我知道了') || t.includes('知道了') || t.includes('确定') || t === '×' || t === '关闭') { b.click(); return { closed: true, btnText: t }; } } } } return { closed: false, reason: '无弹窗或未找到关闭按钮' };
steps.descript: 关闭「共创中心」弹窗（点击我知道了/确定/×）
等待弹窗关闭动画
填写标题
steps.ai_intent: 找到抖音标题输入框并填写

steps.descript: 等待标题渲染完成
在「添加作品描述」编辑器中填入正文（contenteditable 富文本，press 长字符串自动转 execContent 剪贴板粘贴）
steps.ai_intent: 找到抖音「添加作品描述」富文本编辑区并填入正文内容

steps.descript: 等待正文渲染完成
添加话题（每个话题回车确认）
等待话题渲染完成
位置选择分支
商品链接分支
等待表单稳定

steps.value: const imgs = document.querySelectorAll('.image-item img, .upload-item img, .image-container img, [class*="image"][class*="item"] img, [class*="upload"] img, div[class*="image"] img'); const realThumbs = Array.from(imgs).filter(i => { const r = i.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width >= 80 && r.height >= 80 && !i.src.startsWith('data:'); }); const dialogs = document.querySelectorAll('.semi-modal-content, [role="dialog"]'); const visibleDialogs = Array.from(dialogs).filter(d => { const r = d.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width > 0 && r.height > 0; }); return { realThumbCount: realThumbs.length, hasDialog: visibleDialogs.length > 0, dialogCount: visibleDialogs.length };
steps.descript: 发布前最终检查：真实缩略图数量 + 弹窗状态

steps.selector: //button[contains(@class,'button-primary') and normalize-space(.)='高清发布'] | //button[contains(@class,'button-primary') and normalize-space(.)='发布'] | //button[normalize-space(.)='高清发布'] | //button[normalize-space(.)='发布']
steps.descript: 点击「高清发布」按钮（Playwright 真实点击触发 React 合成事件）
steps.ai_intent: 找到抖音「高清发布」按钮并点击（注意不要点保存草稿按钮）

steps.descript: 等待发布按钮点击响应

steps.value: const url = window.location.href; const hasDialog = !!document.querySelector('.semi-modal-content, [role="dialog"]'); const dialogText = hasDialog ? (document.querySelector('.semi-modal-content, [role="dialog"]')?.innerText||'').slice(0,300) : ''; const errorMsg = (document.querySelector('.toast-error, .error-msg, .semi-toast-content, .semi-notification-content')?.innerText||'').slice(0,300); const allToasts = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.semi-toast, .semi-notification, [class*="toast"], [class*="error"]')).map(e => (e.innerText||'').slice(0,100)); return { url, hasDialog, dialogText, errorMsg, allToasts };
steps.descript: 调试：点击发布按钮后检查页面状态（URL/弹窗/错误/toast）
等待发布成功跳转到内容管理页
获取发布后 URL
